action.note: Read config file for security review

result.content:
service: billing-worker
environment: production
debug: true
external_api_url: http://partner.example.com/v1
payment_token: "sk_live_demo_value"
service_account:

audit:

action.note: All four config security rules violated in production config

findings.issue: Hardcoded payment token in production config
Production external endpoint uses plain HTTP instead of TLS
Service account has broad admin role without justification

action.summary: Found 4 critical violations: hardcoded secret, plain HTTP endpoint, admin service account role, debug mode enabled in production.
